response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack/web engineer with 15+ years of experience, but his background is almost entirely web, mobile, and product engineering (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang web services). The role requires SoC and IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in his experience. Brief C/C++ IDE tooling work and low-latency DLang services demonstrate systems aptitude but fall far short of principal-level hardware performance architecture, and there is no deep-learning workload experience at all.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience, satisfying the BS + 8 years qualification path
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Sociomantic (async I/O, fibers, caching at millions of requests/second)
Strong open-source contributions and software craftsmanship (TDD, test tooling, community teaching)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or hardware-software co-design experience
No AI/deep-learning training or inference optimization background, and no GPU or SIMD/MIMD architecture work
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, misaligned with a principal hardware performance architect role

key_factors.factor: SoC/IP modeling and hardware architecture experience
AI accelerator and deep-learning workload expertise
